description.ko: AURA-7은 자연스러운 움직임의 정수를 담아내어, 유동적이고 상호 연결된 패턴을 통해 고요한 디지털 공간에 생명력을 불어넣는 액체 에너지의 리드미컬한 우아함을 시각화합니다.
description.en: AURA-7 captures the essence of natural movement, illustrating the rhythmic grace of liquid energy as it breathes life into a silent digital space through fluid, interconnected patterns.

prompt: abstract generative digital art of organic flow, fluid dynamics with soft pastel gradients, silk-like iridescent textures, bioluminescent curves weaving through a dark void, ethereal atmosphere, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, highly detailed, smooth transitions
